derivatives.name: hy_ig_spread_pct
derivatives.definition: HY OAS minus IG OAS in percent. Wider = more credit stress. Primary indicator column.

derivatives.name: hy_ig_zscore_252d
derivatives.definition: 252-day rolling z-score of HY-IG spread. Dimensionless; positive = spread above recent norm.

derivatives.name: hy_ig_zscore_504d
derivatives.definition: 504-day (~2yr) rolling z-score of HY-IG spread. Slower-moving regime gauge.

derivatives.name: hy_ig_pctrank_504d
derivatives.definition: 2-year percentile rank of HY-IG spread. Values near 1 = historically wide.

derivatives.name: hy_ig_pctrank_1260d
derivatives.definition: 5-year percentile rank of HY-IG spread. Longer-memory gauge.

derivatives.name: hy_ig_roc_21d
derivatives.definition: 21-day percent change in HY-IG spread. Positive = spread widening (bearish).

derivatives.name: hy_ig_roc_63d
derivatives.definition: 63-day (~3M) percent change in HY-IG spread.

derivatives.name: hy_ig_roc_126d
derivatives.definition: 126-day (~6M) percent change in HY-IG spread.

derivatives.name: hy_ig_mom_21d
derivatives.definition: 21-day absolute level change in HY-IG spread (pp).

derivatives.name: hy_ig_mom_63d
derivatives.definition: 63-day absolute level change in HY-IG spread (pp).

derivatives.name: hy_ig_mom_252d
derivatives.definition: 252-day (~1yr) absolute level change in HY-IG spread (pp).

derivatives.name: hy_ig_acceleration
derivatives.definition: Change in 21d rate-of-change — second-difference proxy. Captures inflection dynamics.

derivatives.name: ccc_bb_spread_pct
derivatives.definition: CCC OAS minus BB OAS — within-HY quality spread. Wider = distress concentrated at speculative end.

derivatives.name: hy_ig_realized_vol_21d
derivatives.definition: 21-day realized volatility of daily spread changes (decimal). Rising vol = worsening credit environment.

derivatives.name: hmm_2state_prob_stress
derivatives.definition: HMM 2-state model: probability of being in the stress regime (defined by high spread_change × high VIX).

derivatives.name: ms_2state_stress_prob
derivatives.definition: Markov-Switching regression: smoothed probability of the high-variance (stress) regime.

derivatives.name: spy_ret
derivatives.definition: SPY daily total return (decimal). Primary dependent variable for strategy backtest.

derivatives.name: spy_fwd_1d
derivatives.definition: SPY 1-day forward return (decimal).

derivatives.name: spy_fwd_5d
derivatives.definition: SPY 5-day forward return (decimal).

derivatives.name: spy_fwd_21d
derivatives.definition: SPY 21-day (~1M) forward return (decimal). Primary regression target.

derivatives.name: spy_fwd_63d
derivatives.definition: SPY 63-day (~3M) forward return (decimal).

derivatives.name: spy_fwd_126d
derivatives.definition: SPY 126-day (~6M) forward return (decimal).

derivatives.name: spy_fwd_252d
derivatives.definition: SPY 252-day (~1yr) forward return (decimal).

derivatives.name: strategy_returns
derivatives.definition: Daily backtest return stream for the winning strategy. Computed from winner signal × SPY daily return.

notes: Scope-disciplined per ECON-SD. All 16 indicator derivatives are hy_ig_spread_pct-derived or credit-regime signals. Off-scope cross-market signals (yield curve, bank/small-cap ratio, NFCI momentum) are reported in analyst_suggestions.json.
